name: netrecon
description: Concurrent multi-engine network profiler: nmap + masscan + rustscan + arp-scan + Shodan all running simultaneously
author: 0xb0rn3 | github.com/0xb0rn3

optional_dependencies.rustscan: Fast port discovery - cargo install rustscan
optional_dependencies.arp-scan: Local MAC discovery (root) - apt install arp-scan
optional_dependencies.whois: WHOIS org lookup - apt install whois
optional_dependencies.requests: HTTP analysis + ASN lookup - pip3 install requests
optional_dependencies.dnspython: Full DNS enumeration - pip3 install dnspython
optional_dependencies.shodan: Shodan API enrichment - pip3 install shodan

help.description: Concurrent multi-engine network reconnaissance. Launches nmap, masscan, rustscan, arp-scan and Shodan simultaneously then merges all results into a unified full network profile with host discovery, open ports, service versions, OS fingerprints, HTTP tech stack, TLS certs, CVE mapping, ASN/country data, and risk scoring.

examples: quick   - Fast, top ports, minimal service detection
normal  - Balanced, top-1000 ports, full service + HTTP detection
deep    - All ports, vuln scripts, OS fingerprinting

os_detection.description: Enable OS fingerprinting (always on in deep mode)

vuln_scripts.description: Run nmap vuln NSE scripts (always on in deep mode)

shodan_key.description: Shodan API key for external threat intelligence

exclude.description: Comma-separated IPs to exclude from scan

concurrent_engines.rustscan: Fast port discovery wrapper around nmap
concurrent_engines.arp-scan: Local network MAC + host discovery (requires root)
concurrent_engines.shodan: External threat intelligence via Shodan API
concurrent_engines.dns: Forward, reverse, MX, NS, TXT record enumeration
concurrent_engines.http: Web tech stack, titles, TLS certs per HTTP port
concurrent_engines.banner: Raw TCP banner fallback when nmap unavailable

services.cves: Correlated CVE list with CVSS scores

summary.total_open_ports: Total open ports across all hosts
summary.vulnerabilities: CVE severity breakdown + top CVE IDs
summary.high_risk_hosts: IPs with HIGH or CRITICAL risk score

installation_tiers.basic: TCP connect scan (stdlib only — always works)
installation_tiers.enhanced: + masscan fast discovery, arp-scan MAC lookup (root required)

notes: ⚠️  AUTHORIZATION REQUIRED: Only scan systems you have permission to test
⚠️  masscan and arp-scan require root/sudo privileges
⚠️  Shodan API key required for external intelligence lookup
💡 Falls back gracefully to TCP connect if no tools are installed
💡 Use 'deep' mode for complete assessment; 'quick' for fast triage
💡 All engines run concurrently — total time ≈ slowest tool, not sum
💡 ARP scan auto-triggers on private/local network targets
💡 HTTP analysis runs automatically on web ports (80,443,8080,8443...)
💡 CVE correlation runs against a built-in database of 60+ CVEs
💡 Risk score is composite: open ports + CVE severity + cleartext protocols
🔒 Always follow responsible disclosure and legal authorization requirements
help.legal_disclaimer: This tool is for authorized security testing only. Only use on networks and systems for which you have explicit written permission. Unauthorized network scanning may violate computer fraud laws in your jurisdiction.
